instructions: Read AGENTS.md files before making changes and follow the most specific one.
Prefer the minimal architecture that still works.
Before changing code, inspect surrounding code to understand ownership, data flow, and existing patterns.
Treat overlapping state, variables, helpers, or concepts as suspicious unless clearly necessary.
Prefer expressing logic through existing ownership and state instead of introducing parallel structures.
Remove unnecessary layers, prop drilling, helpers, and indirection when doing so simplifies the code.
Keep behavior close to where it is used. Prefer explicit local logic over abstraction.
Treat any API expansion as a regression by default.
Do not declare a fix complete unless validated or explicitly marked unvalidated.
Review the diff and reduce it to the minimal architecture that still works.
Check surrounding code for duplication, overlap, and unnecessary parallel structures.
Remove unnecessary indirection and API surface.
Do not introduce new abstractions unless required to simplify.
